g.text: Hezron, at sixty, married the daughter of
· who had twenty-three cities in Gilead
Geshur and Aram took Jair’s towns — sixty cities
after Hezron died in Caleb Ephrathah:

svg.text: verse 25 — The sons of Jerahmeel the firstborn of Hezron were Ram the firstborn, Bunah, Oren, Ozem, and Ahijah.
these were the sons of Jerahmeel (v. 33)
